mapper.select: SELECT id, connection_id AS connectionId, term, term_type AS termType, table_name AS tableName, column_name AS columnName, formula, filter_condition AS filterCondition, priority, status, remark, create_by AS createBy, create_time AS createTime, update_by AS updateBy, update_time AS updateTime FROM text2sql_semantic_term WHERE status = 1 AND (connection_id = #{connectionId} OR connection_id IS NULL) ORDER BY priority DESC

SELECT id, connection_id AS connectionId, term, term_type AS termType, table_name AS tableName, column_name AS columnName, formula, filter_condition AS filterCondition, priority, status, remark, create_by AS createBy, create_time AS createTime, update_by AS updateBy, update_time AS updateTime FROM text2sql_semantic_term WHERE status = 1 AND (connection_id = #{connectionId} OR connection_id IS NULL) AND LOWER(term) = LOWER(#{term}) ORDER BY priority DESC
